data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for upgrading to additional credits, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for an upgrade for additional credits, yet no concrete API reads or persisted state checks were performed to verify this requirement. Therefore, a gap exists in the evidence regarding the coverage of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality for upgrading to additional credits.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to validate upgrade functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the upgrade for additional credits is available and functioning as expected.
